_meta.description: Curated seed list of travel-tech startups. Imported via /import admin page. Each entry becomes a synthetic Signal flowing through the normal classification + startup-repository pipeline. Add new entries here or import via CSV.

startups.name: Navan

startups.description: API-first corporate travel infrastructure rebuilt from scratch

startups.description: Tours and activities arm of TUI Group

startups.description: Travel demand forecasting from booking data

startups.description: Aviation analytics and data platform (LexisNexis-owned)

startups.name: Skyscanner
startups.description: Travel metasearch owned by Trip.com Group

startups.name: Trivago
startups.description: Hotel metasearch, majority-owned by Expedia Group

startups.name: ACI blueSmart
startups.description: AI-driven airport operations platform

startups.name: Blacklane
startups.description: Global premium chauffeur and airport transfer service

startups.name: Welcome Pickups
startups.description: Airport transfer and local rides with personal experience

startups.name: Kyte
startups.description: Car rental delivered to your door

startups.name: Wingo
startups.description: Airport experience and lounge access platform

startups.name: Bounce
startups.description: Luggage storage network across cities and airports

startups.name: Hopjump
startups.description: Package holidays booking with flexible payment

startups.name: Triptease
startups.description: Direct booking platform helping hotels compete with OTAs

startups.name: Revinate
startups.description: Hotel guest data platform and marketing automation

startups.name: Verteil Technologies
startups.description: NDC aggregator (Verteil Direct Connect) connecting 50+ airlines including Air India, Turkish Airlines, and Riyadh Air to travel sellers globally — a leaner airline-controlled alternative to Amadeus distribution

startups.name: TPConnects
startups.description: IATA-certified NDC aggregation platform (Astra for airlines, Iris for sellers) backed by Flight Centre; strong Middle East and South Asia footprint

startups.name: Accelya
startups.description: Airline retailing platform (FLX ONE) processing 31 billion NDC offers daily and settling $100B+ annually for 200+ airlines; acquired Farelogix in 2020 — Amadeus's single largest direct competitor in airline retailing

startups.name: Datalex
startups.description: Airline Offer & Order Management System (Stellex) deployed at easyJet, Virgin Australia, and LATAM; raised €25M in 2024 competing directly with Amadeus Offers & Orders

startups.name: AirGateway
startups.description: NDC aggregator targeting the corporate/TMC channel with aggregated content from 35+ airlines — threatens Amadeus's highest-margin managed travel GDS revenue

startups.name: Paxport
startups.description: Cloud-based NDC distribution platform; Ryanair's first approved OTA aggregator (2024) — sets a template for airline-controlled GDS bypass

startups.name: Safeture
startups.description: SaaS travel risk management and mobile safety platform (ARR $5.5M, +16% YoY) integrating with TMC platforms for corporate duty of care — potential Amadeus acquisition target

startups.name: Crisis24
startups.description: GardaWorld's consolidated enterprise duty of care platform (Horizon) rolling up WorldAware, OnSolve, and Anvil Group — the dominant corporate travel risk suite for Fortune 500

startups.name: Dataminr
startups.description: AI real-time threat intelligence platform ($4.1B valuation); partnered with Healix International in 2025 for integrated travel risk management for corporate travelers

startups.name: Riskline
startups.description: Travel risk intelligence API covering 220+ countries with real-time risk ratings — already integrated into TMC and corporate booking platforms, embeddable at point of booking

startups.name: Factal
startups.description: Real-time verified threat intelligence platform backed by International SOS; detects and geolocates global incidents for corporate security and travel risk teams

startups.name: Atlys
startups.description: AI-powered visa processing platform for 120+ destinations with automated document verification; backed by a16z and Peak XV — raised $36M Series C in 2026

startups.name: Sherpa
startups.description: B2B travel requirements API delivering real-time visa, passport, and entry-rule data to airlines, OTAs, and corporate booking tools in 50+ countries

startups.name: iVisa
startups.description: Profitable consumer and B2B visa application platform automating tourist visas and eVisa procurement for 190+ countries

startups.name: VisaHQ
startups.description: Tech-enabled visa concierge platform serving individual travelers and enterprises with visa processing, passport renewals, and document authentication

startups.name: Thrust Carbon
startups.description: API-first carbon measurement platform for business travel integrating with TMCs and OBTs to provide per-journey emissions data for EU CSRD Scope 3 compliance reporting

startups.name: Squake
startups.description: Carbon calculation and SAF offset API for travel and logistics companies, enabling sustainability tracking to be embedded directly into booking workflows

startups.name: Chooose
startups.description: SAF purchasing and carbon offsetting platform for airlines, OTAs, and logistics; backed by GenZero (Temasek) and Shell Ventures — has received strategic investment from Amadeus

startups.name: Goodwings
startups.description: Sustainable TMC platform funding SAF and carbon offsets from booking revenue, with a corporate Scope 3 compliance suite for EU CSRD reporting

startups.name: ixigo
startups.description: India's leading train, bus, and flight OTA targeting Tier 2/3 cities with AI price prediction; IPO'd on NSE/BSE in June 2024 raising ~$89M

startups.name: Almosafer
startups.description: Saudi Arabia's largest OTA with 61% air market share and $1.2B GBV in 2024; PIF-backed and planning Saudi Exchange IPO as Vision 2030 drives inbound tourism

startups.name: Wego
startups.description: Travel metasearch for flights and hotels across APAC and MENA, with dual-market focus on Southeast Asia and the Middle East

startups.name: TBO Tek
startups.description: B2B travel distribution platform connecting 160,000+ travel agents and corporates globally to hotel, air, and ancillary inventory via API; IPO'd May 2024 raising ~$186M

startups.name: RateHawk
startups.description: B2B hotel rate aggregation platform with $3.7B gross transaction value in 2024 (67% YoY growth), serving travel agents and OTAs across 100+ countries via API and white-label portal

startups.name: Gathern
startups.description: Saudi Arabia's leading vacation rental marketplace with 72,000+ properties and 44% market share, backed by PIF's Sanabil Investments — Series B in August 2025

startups.name: Duetto
startups.description: Hotel revenue strategy platform using AI and open pricing to optimize room rates and demand forecasting for hotel groups and independent properties
